Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion, Points And Authorities To Quash Defendants' Subpoenas For San Francisco General Hospital Medical Records
Off Calendar May-24-2022 Off Calendar

Motion To Quash Defendants' Subpoenas For San Francisco General Hospital Medical Records
Off Calendar May-24-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF GLENN HUBBARD's Motion To Quash Defendants' Subpoenas For San Francisco General Hospital Medical Records.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion to quash DENIED. The materials submitted in Defendant's papers suggest overlapping comorbidities that may or may not be attributable to the injuries sustained in the subject motor vehicle accident, and which are likely to require expert witness analysis. Moreover, Plaintiff's discovery responses "reserve the right" to amend the conditions identified in FROG Series 6, and it would be unduly burdensome to require Defendants and/or the subpoena recipient to re-serve subpoenas for any expansion.

The prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order to the pro tem judge by email sent to sborrowman@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
